summary: The footage captures a vehicle traveling along a rural road under overcast skies. A large truck overtakes the vehicle from the opposite direction, passing closely beside it.

events_timeline.event: A large truck overtakes the vehicle from the opposite direction, passing closely beside it.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the truck is unclear due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of collision or severe disruption; the truck passes safely.
